title: T-025 — Stock move service (transfer/issue/return/quarantine)
prompt:
# T-025 — Stock move service

PRD: `05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md` §8.1 (FR-WH-010), V-WH-MOV-001..005.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
`createStockMove(input)` Server Action that records a stock_moves row, updates LP.location_id, validates move semantics per §8.1.

## Implementation contract
`apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/stock-move.ts`. Validate LP status IN ('available','reserved'); destination location active; reason_code present for adjustment/quarantine/return. If move_type='consume_to_wo', delegate to scanner consume endpoint (T-034). If move_qty < LP.qty, delegate to T-026 split-cascade. Single transaction. Generate move_number (SM-YYYY-NNNNN).

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/stock-move.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/stock-move.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a full-qty transfer between two locations, when createStockMove runs, then LP.location_id updates and a stock_moves row is created.
2. Given LP.status='consumed', when createStockMove runs, then it returns V-WH-MOV-001 validation error.
3. Given destination location.active=false, when createStockMove runs, then it returns V-WH-MOV-003 validation error.
4. Given a partial move (qty < LP.qty), when createStockMove runs, then it dispatches to T-026 split-cascade and returns the created child LP id.

## Test strategy
- RED: stock-move.test.ts covers full transfer, status guard, inactive location, partial cascade dispatch.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test stock-move`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow moves on consumed/shipped/blocked LPs.
- Do not auto-resolve inactive locations.
- Do not embed put-away rules (P2).

pipeline_inputs.description: Generic stock move Server Action with status/destination validation.
pipeline_inputs.details: Validate LP status, destination active, reason_code for adjustment/quarantine/return. Partial moves dispatch to split-cascade.

Given destination.active=false, when service runs, then V-WH-MOV-003 error returns
